review_reason: Phases 6-7 (Truth Lemma, Completeness) blocked: connecting product domain to BFMCS multi-MCS families requires architectural decision on embedding approach

artifacts.summary: Product domain TaskFrame Q with non-trivial task_rel, canonical model, histories, shift-closed Omega (sorry-free)
Implementation summary for v007 product domain construction

partial_progress.details: Phases 0-5 and 8 completed. TemporalDomain.lean is sorry-free with TaskFrame Q, canonical model, histories, and shift-closed Omega. Phases 6-7 (truth lemma, completeness) blocked: the temporal operators G/H require multi-MCS histories that traverse different quotient classes, but simple single-MCS histories give G(phi) iff phi. Connecting to existing BFMCS infrastructure requires embedding Int-indexed families into Q-indexed product domain.

completion_data.completion_summary: Built sorry-free TaskFrame Q with product domain (RestrictedQuotient x Q), non-trivial task_rel (rational displacement), canonical model, world histories, and shift-closed Omega. Truth lemma and completeness blocked on connecting to existing BFMCS multi-MCS family infrastructure.

errors.message: Truth lemma for G/H requires multi-MCS histories; single-MCS histories make G(phi) iff phi. Need to embed BFMCS Int families into product domain Q or build restricted fragment FMCS analog.
errors.recommendation: Option A: Build Int-to-Q embedding of existing BFMCS construction into product domain. Option B: Build FMCS analog on RestrictedFragment with Q-indexed families. Option C: Accept existing completeness over TaskFrame Int and treat product domain as supplementary frame construction.
